falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% with a volume spike exceeding 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish breakout contradicting the pattern's implied bearish or sideways bias, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would suggest extreme overbought conditions and a potential top, directly contradicting the pattern's historical bottom behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed bullish engulfing pattern forms on the daily chart with a 3-day volume surge above 150% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal strong buying pressure and a reversal in trend, falsifying the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
